project.name: Connected Coffee Fleet OTA + Cloud Architecture
project.description:
This document models connected coffee machines that send telemetry to a central cloud site,
receive OTA firmware updates, and produce operational and audit logging evidence.
Authored functional architecture remains stable while runtime, code, and verification layers
are inferred from infrastructure, source, and test artifacts.

trustZones.name: Cloud Control Boundary
trustZones.description: Boundary between cloud app workloads and privileged platform controls.

trustZones.name: Edge Device Boundary
trustZones.description: Boundary between managed edge devices and cloud control plane.

components.name: Barista
components.description: Operates coffee machines and observes local device status.

components.name: Fleet Operator
components.description: Manages OTA campaigns and fleet-wide operational decisions.

components.name: Platform Operator
components.description: Operates cloud runtime, deployment, and reliability controls.

components.name: Security Analyst
components.description: Reviews firmware integrity, identity controls, and audit logging.

components.description: prod us-east-1

components.name: Coffee Edge Fleet
components.description: edge global

components.name: Cloud Runtime Operations
components.description: Owns runtime deployment lifecycle, scaling controls, and runtime operational safety.

components.name: Device Identity and Secrets
components.description: Manages device credentials, cloud tokens, and secure configuration used by edge/cloud units.

components.name: Fleet Ingestion API
components.description: Receives telemetry and machine status, applies validation, and emits ingestion events.

components.name: Fleet Observability Reporting
components.description: Aggregates telemetry and OTA outcomes into dashboards, alerts, and audit records.

components.name: Machine Telemetry Collection
components.description: Collects brew/device telemetry and transmits cloud-bound telemetry payloads.

components.name: OTA Update Agent
components.description: Downloads signed firmware bundles, validates integrity, applies updates, and reports status.

components.name: Update Campaign Orchestration
components.description: Plans OTA rollout cohorts, drives update commands, and handles rollback flow decisions.

threats.name: Audit log tampering suppresses OTA incident visibility
threats.description: Adversary attempts to alter or suppress security-relevant logs to hide malicious behavior.

threats.name: Tampered firmware bundle executes on edge fleet
threats.description: Attacker attempts to deliver malicious firmware by replacing or tampering rollout artifact.

threats.name: Spoofed OTA command triggers unauthorized rollout
threats.description: Unauthorized sender attempts to push OTA command messages to device fleet topic.

threats.name: Telemetry replay inflates ingest and distorts reporting
threats.description: Replayed telemetry bursts attempt to pollute fleet metrics and trigger false alerts.

mitigations.name: CTRL-COFFEE-DEVICE-IDENTITY
mitigations.description: Planned immutable log retention and append-only controls for OTA incident trails.

mitigations.name: CTRL-COFFEE-DEVICE-IDENTITY
mitigations.description: Device identity claims gate command and telemetry channels.

mitigations.name: CTRL-COFFEE-FIRMWARE-SIGNATURE
mitigations.description: OTA agent enforces signature verification with signer metadata checks.

mitigations.name: CTRL-COFFEE-DEVICE-IDENTITY
mitigations.description: Replay window and dedup controls are active with ongoing burst tuning.
